title: Police seek two women to assist Knysna investigation
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna police have launched a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna police have launched a search for two women who may be able to assist with a criminal investigation.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna police have launched a search for two women who may be able to assist with a criminal investigation."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to available information, the women stayed overnight at a flat in Knysna’s central business district during December 2025."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At the time, both were wearing black tops. A photograph of the pair has been made available.","html":"At the time, both were wearing black tops. A photograph of the pair has been made available."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Anyone with information that may assist police in tracing the women is urged to contact Sergeant Jocelyn Williams on 044 302 6652 or Crime Stop on 08600 10111.","html":"Anyone with information that may assist police in tracing the women is urged to contact Sergeant Jocelyn Williams on 044 302 6652 or Crime Stop on 08600 10111."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"All information will be treated as confidential.","html":"All information will be treated as confidential."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]

images.alt: Police seek two women to assist Knysna investigation
